steps.title: Use the later noun
steps.content: The colon introduces the decision made by the judges for the 1974 Nobel Prize in Literature. The pronoun before the colon must refer to that plural group.

steps.title: Choose a plural pronoun
steps.content: Choice A is second person, Choice B is singular, and Choice C is a singular indefinite pronoun. A plural pronoun agrees with the judges. The answer is D.
